title: Capture telemetry from main run, not retry
description: When ClaudeCodeAgentRunner._exec_json() falls back to _retry_structured_output(), the telemetry captured on AgentRunResult comes from the retry response envelope (1 turn, low cost) instead of the main run. Fix: capture telemetry from the main run's response envelope before attempting the retry. If the retry fires, merge/add the retry cost and duration onto the main telemetry rather than replacing it. The final telemetry dict should reflect the total cost and the main run's turn count, token usage, and session_id.
acceptance_criteria: Telemetry reflects the main run's num_turns, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache tokens, and session_id
When retry fires, cost_usd and duration_ms include both main run and retry
When retry does not fire, telemetry is unchanged from current behavior
